message:
fix(policy,clippy): mandatory canary gate on recovery + resolve 6 clippy lints

Policy change: recover_from_fallback() now caps at Canary mode when the
pre-fallback mode was Enforce, requiring the system to re-prove itself
in Canary before returning to Enforce. Updated 3 decision_plane_tests to
match the new canary-gated recovery semantics.

Clippy fixes across 5 files:
- dual.rs: move consts before statements (items_after_statements)
- guardrails.rs: use f64::clamp() (manual_clamp)
- pal.rs: remove unnecessary Result wrapper (unnecessary_wraps)
- deletion.rs: use let...else (manual_let_else)
- loop_main.rs: add missing config_update field + prefix unused param

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
